gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN connected AS T3 ON T1.atom_id = T3.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_type = '='
pred_sql:
SELECT element
FROM (
    SELECT a1.element
    FROM bond b
    JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = '='
    
    UNION
    
    SELECT a2.element
    FROM bond b
    JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = '='
)
ORDER BY element;
question: What elements are in a double type bond?
